domain: Knowledge Graph Integration for SLM Reasoning

graph_rag_frameworks.name: Microsoft GraphRAG
graph_rag_frameworks.description: Pioneering community-detection-based GraphRAG. Builds knowledge graphs from private datasets using LLMs, with global and local search modes. Hierarchical clustering via Leiden technique.

graph_rag_frameworks.name: LightRAG
graph_rag_frameworks.description: Simple and fast GraphRAG with dual-level retrieval (low-level entity-specific + high-level thematic). Integrates knowledge graphs with vector representations. Supports incremental updates.
graph_rag_frameworks.slm_support: Better than GraphRAG but still LLM-focused

graph_rag_frameworks.name: nano-GraphRAG
graph_rag_frameworks.description: Lightweight (~1100 lines) alternative to Microsoft GraphRAG. Highly customizable, supports local Huggingface models. Three query modes: naive, local, global.
graph_rag_frameworks.model_support: Any LLM including local HuggingFace models

graph_rag_frameworks.name: MiniRAG
graph_rag_frameworks.description: Purpose-built for Small Language Models. Heterogeneous graph indexing combining text chunks and named entities. Topology-enhanced retrieval without advanced language capabilities. 25% storage of LLM methods.

knowledge_graph_memory_platforms.name: Cognee
knowledge_graph_memory_platforms.description: AI memory engine combining vector search with graph databases. Six-stage pipeline: classify, permissions, chunk, extract entities/relationships, summarize, embed. 14 retrieval modes. Memify post-processing for graph refinement.

knowledge_graph_memory_platforms.name: Graphiti (by Zep)
knowledge_graph_memory_platforms.description: Real-time temporal knowledge graphs for AI agents. Tracks how facts change over time with validity windows. Hybrid search (semantic + keyword + graph traversal). P95 latency ~300ms.
knowledge_graph_memory_platforms.slm_support: Limited - requires capable LLMs for entity extraction

llm_kg_integration_libraries.name: LlamaIndex Knowledge Graph Module
llm_kg_integration_libraries.description: KnowledgeGraphIndex for automated KG construction, KnowledgeGraphRAGQueryEngine for existing KGs, KnowledgeGraphQueryEngine for NL2Cypher. Part of broader LlamaIndex ecosystem.
llm_kg_integration_libraries.slm_support: Moderate - works with local models but quality degrades

llm_kg_integration_libraries.name: Neo4j GraphRAG Python Package
llm_kg_integration_libraries.description: Official Neo4j GraphRAG with KG creation pipeline, entity extraction, embedding generation. Supports text2Cypher, vector search, full-text search, and graph traversal retrieval patterns.
llm_kg_integration_libraries.model_support: OpenAI, VertexAI, Anthropic, Cohere, Azure, Ollama, LangChain models

gnn_kg_reasoning.name: GNN-RAG
gnn_kg_reasoning.description: GNN reasons over dense KG subgraph to retrieve answer candidates, then extracts shortest paths as reasoning paths for LLM. Matches GPT-4 with 7B model on KGQA benchmarks.
gnn_kg_reasoning.slm_support: Good - demonstrated with 7B model matching GPT-4
key_features: competitive with GPT-4 using small models

gnn_kg_reasoning.name: Paths-over-Graph (PoG)
gnn_kg_reasoning.description: Enhances LLM reasoning with knowledge reasoning paths from KGs. Three-phase dynamic multi-hop path exploration with three-step pruning (graph structure, LLM prompting, PLMs).

knowledge_graph_embedding.name: PyKEEN
knowledge_graph_embedding.description: Python library for training and evaluating KG embedding models. 40+ models, 34 interactions, 15 loss functions, 37 built-in datasets. Auto memory optimization and HPO via Optuna.
knowledge_graph_embedding.slm_support: N/A - embedding-focused, but embeddings can augment SLMs

kg_construction_tools.name: Neo4j LLM Knowledge Graph Builder
kg_construction_tools.description: Visual tool for building knowledge graphs from documents using LLMs. Community summaries, local/global retrievers. Fourth most popular interaction on AuraDB Free.

kg_construction_tools.name: llmgraph
kg_construction_tools.description: Create knowledge graphs from Wikipedia pages using LLMs. Exports in GraphML, GEXF, and HTML formats.

research_frameworks.name: KG Structure as Prompt
research_frameworks.description: Integrates structural KG information (common neighbors, metapaths) into prompt-based learning for SLMs. Specifically targets improving SLM capabilities for knowledge-based causal discovery.

research_frameworks.name: SMART SLM
research_frameworks.description: Structured Memory and Reasoning Transformer - a small language model with structured memory for accurate document assistance. Combines structured knowledge with compact model architecture.

research_frameworks.name: KG-MASD (Knowledge Graph Multi-Agent System Distillation)
research_frameworks.description: Distillation framework using KGs as verifiable structured prior for edge deployment. Formulates distillation as MDP with KG-enriched state representation.

research_frameworks.name: CogGRAG
research_frameworks.description: Human cognition-inspired graph-based RAG for KGQA. Unifies problem decomposition, knowledge retrieval, and reasoning under single graph-structured cognitive framework.

graph_databases_with_slm_focus.name: Memgraph + SLM Combo
graph_databases_with_slm_focus.description: Memgraph positioned as ideal KG backend for domain-trained SLMs. Acts as 'constant tutor and interpreter' for SLMs, providing structured reasoning support.
graph_databases_with_slm_focus.slm_support: Excellent - marketed specifically for SLM pairing
